texto: If we do not rise to the challenge of our unique capacity to shape our lives to seek the kinds of growth that we find individually fulfilling then we can have no security: we will live in a world of sham in which our selves are determined by the will of others in which we will be constantly buffeted and increasingly isolated by the changes round us.
explicacao: Citação de Nena O'Neil sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “If we do not rise to the challenge of our unique capacity to shape our lives to seek the kinds of…” articula reflexao, right, which em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
